instruction: Reply to Dr. Elaine Mercer at Northbridge Academy about Lena's accommodation plan. Thank her for summarizing the classroom supports, say I agree with the quiet-testing room and weekly reading check-ins, ask whether the school counselor can also be included on future updates, and let her know I'll send the pediatrician's note separately.

rule_ref.rule_text: When writing messages that matter, she prefers to draft them for review instead of sending immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For important messages, I want a draft first instead of sending it right away.

attributes.subject: Lena accommodation plan and classroom supports
attributes.body: Hello Jennifer, following our earlier conversation, I've outlined a few support options for Lena at school. The team can add access to a quiet-testing room, weekly reading check-ins with the literacy specialist, and a written update process so everyone stays aligned. Let me know which of these you agree with and whether you'd like the school counselor included on future updates. If you have a recent pediatrician note, feel free to send it along for the file.

attributes.subject: Field day volunteer sign-up
attributes.body: We're opening volunteer slots for this year's field day. If you'd like to help with snacks, setup, or cleanup, please reply by Friday.

attributes.subject: Dinner next week?
attributes.body: Hey Jennifer, checking whether you want to get dinner sometime next week if your schedule opens up.
